import { pack, packId, ref } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// Lists the same member twice: membership is single-sourced on the manifest, and a duplicate is
// ambiguous (L2) — the pack-coherence check fails it.
export const duplicatedMembershipPack = pack({
  id: packId("pack:checkout-v1"),
  title: "Checkout v1",
  specs: [ref("spec:orders.create-order"), ref("spec:orders.create-order")],
});
